articles.title: Billboard’s Music Industry Events Calendar
articles.summary: A complete rundown of the most important events across the music business.

articles.title: USC Settles Sony Lawsuit Over Beyoncé and Harry Styles Songs in Sports Team Social Media Videos
articles.summary: The college sports powerhouse allegedly didn't get licenses to use chart-topping tracks like “Break My Soul” and “As It Was" in Instagram and TikTok posts.

articles.title: Cardi B Brings ‘Little Miss Drama’ Tour Home to New York City: 6 Best Moments
articles.summary: From a Lil' Kim cameo to a surprise Cash Cobain performance, here are the best moments of Cardi B's Little Miss Drama tour stop at Madison Square Garden.

articles.title: Melissa Etheridge Grapples With Losing Her Son on New Album ‘Rise’: ‘He Was My Greatest Teacher’
articles.summary: The Rock Hall-nominated singer-songwriter also talks about working with Chris Stapleton and why the "album as an art form" still matters.

articles.title: Here Are the 2026 Femmy Awards Winners: Full List
articles.summary: Presented by Femme House, the awards were handed out during a ceremony on March 26 at Miami's Palm Tree Club.

articles.title: ‘Umamusume: Cinderella Gray’ Vol. 23 Bows at No. 1 on Billboard Japan Book Hot 100 as ‘Project Hail Mary’ Returns to Top 20
articles.summary: Yama Wayama’s Famiresu Iko. Part 2 holds at No. 2.

articles.title: Teksupport Co-Founders Locked in Legal Battle Over Future of the New York Dance Events Company
articles.summary: Rob Toma claims Mike Vitacco is squeezing him out of Teksupport parent company TCE Presents. Vitacco says Toma is orchestrating “certain destruction.”

articles.title: Primary Wave makes strategic investment in Vietnam’s POPS Music – with plans to ramp up catalog deals in Southeast Asia
articles.summary:
POPS claims to be 'home to the largest catalog of Vietnamese and Indonesian music'
Source

articles.title: Australia’s GYRO Group expands into Latin America with new office in Brazil
articles.summary:
The global music company has opened a new HQ in Santos, São Paulo, Brazil.
Source

articles.title: Symphonic acquires music distribution and YouTube monetization platform Distro Nation
articles.summary:
Jon Baltz, CEO and Co-Founder of Distro Nation, will join Symphonic’s executive team as Head of UGC & Rights Management, along with his team.
Source

articles.title: TuneCore report celebrates more Accelerator success metrics
articles.summary: TuneCore has published the fourth edition of its ‘TuneCore Accelerator Report’, trumpeting some of the stats from its in-house artist-development program. The company says that the Accelerator “contributed to over 2.8 billion artist discoveries and 6.8 billion track discoveries…

articles.title: Spotify’s new London lounge is tuned for artist listening parties
articles.summary: Spotify has unveiled its new ‘Listening Lounge’ in the company’s London office, designed as a showcase – custom-built sound system included – for its lossless audio. However, it’s  also as a space for artists to hold listening parties for their top fans, with Joy Crookes, Nao…

articles.title: Sam Fender raised £50k for Youth Music through ticket donations
articles.summary: Say what you like about Sam Fender, but… actually, we’ve yet to hear anyone say something bad about the British artist: his reputation as a Good Egg Of Music is nailed on at this point. Having donated his £25k winnings from last year’s Mercury Prize to grassroots-live…

articles.title: Musixmatch unveils Sentinel music copyright-detection service
articles.summary: Musixmatch may be best known for its lyrics licensing deals, but the company’s latest product focuses on detecting usage of those lyrics that hasn’t been licensed. It’s called Sentinel, and is pitched as “a real time music copyright detection service designed for user-generated…

articles.title: Musixmatch launches ‘Sentinel’ service to detect when copyrighted music and lyrics are used in AI and user-generated content
articles.summary:
The new service, called Sentinel, draws on the company's lyrics database.
Source

articles.title: Google’s Lyria goes ‘Pro’ with songs up to three minutes long
articles.summary: Last month we reported on a big expansion for Google’s Lyria 3 AI-music model, when it was added to the company’s Gemini assistant. Now there’s been a further development. There is now an “advanced version” called Lyria 3 Pro, whose main improvement is its ability to generate…

articles.title: US Supreme Court backs Cox Communications in piracy fight with labels
articles.summary: The legal battle between multiple labels and US ISP Cox Communications has been running for more than a decade now, but we may have finally reached a decisive verdict – and it’s not in favour of the labels. The case focused on whether Cox was liable for copyright infringement…

articles.title: Watch out Epidemic Sound: Google launches Lyria 3 Pro AI model that can generate 3-minute tracks
articles.summary:
The tech giant is likely positioning the technology as a direct competitor to royalty-free production music services like Epidemic Sound.
Source

articles.title: Timbaland’s AI artist TaTa Taktumi bags record deal with PMG
articles.summary: Superstar producer Timbaland joined Suno as a “strategic advisor” in October 2024, just a few months after the three major labels sued the AI-music firm for copyright infringement. He has continued to fly the flag for Suno ever since, taking some social-media flak from musicians…

articles.title: South Korea’s Kakao Entertainment appoints JungHee Ko as Co-CEO alongside Joseph Chang in leadership restructure
articles.summary:
Ko takes on an additional role as Chief Platform Officer, overseeing a newly created unit responsible for Kakao Entertainment's platform services
Source

articles.title: BMG revenue dipped to €900M in 2025 but EBITDA margin hit record 32% – as catalog investment topped $400M
articles.summary:
BMG says that its underlying recorded music streaming subscription revenue grew by double digits in 2025
Source

articles.title: Marathi “pop culture” festival Rada to spotlight the language’s hip-hop and pop stars
articles.summary:
Marathi is one of the fastest-growing regional segments on Indian audio-streaming services so it’s fitting that musicians make up the majority of the line-up at the inaugural edition of Rada, […]
The post is from Music Ally.

articles.title: Indian music stars King and Zaeden to make acting debuts
articles.summary:

articles.title: Bollywood playback singing superstar Shreya Ghoshal has released a live album
articles.summary:
In the streaming age, live albums—like greatest hits or best-of compilations—are a rarity. They’re even rarer among Indian acts. So film playback superstar Shreya Ghoshal’s The All Hearts Tour – […]
The post is from Music Ally.

articles.title: BTS comeback concert drew 18.4M global viewers says Netflix, as attendance figures spark debate
articles.summary:
The group's first live performance since 2022 was streamed from Seoul's Gwanghwamun Square.
Source

articles.title: Country Profile – China 2026

articles.title: Epic Games layoffs follow ‘downturn in Fortnite engagement’
articles.summary: Are things alright in Fortnite-land? Seemingly not, according to the announcement by its publisher, Epic Games, that it is laying off more than 1,000 staff. “The downturn in Fortnite engagement that started in 2025 means we’re spending significantly more than we’re…

articles.title: 300m viewers for BTS comeback gig? Netflix says it was 18.4m
articles.summary: Well, this is awkward. Two separate newspapers confidently claimed that BTS’s comeback concert had been watched by an estimated 300 million people on Netflix. However, Netflix… begs to differ. “BTS The Comeback Live | Arirang drew 18.4 million global viewers (Live+1),…

articles.title: Spotify takes aim at Canadian levy (again) with Loud & Clear stats
articles.summary: Spotify’s opposition to Canada’s levy on global streaming services is deep, so it never misses an opportunity to trumpet its value to Canadian artists and music beyond that. The latest example is its Canada-focused ‘Loud & Clear’ stats, pitched as proof that “more Canadian…

articles.title: Seeker Music Group bags $267m in asset-backed securitisation
articles.summary: A quick definition for readers outside the music-finance world: in this context, an asset-backed securitisation is when the future income streams from music catalogues are packaged into tradable financial instruments which can be sold to investors. The latest example comes from…

articles.title: Rémi STEFANINI, nouveau directeur des technologies, de l’innovation et de l’intelligence artificielle
articles.summary: Rémi STEFANINI rejoindra la CNIL le 15 avril 2026 en tant que directeur des technologies, de l’innovation et de l’IA de la CNIL.

articles.title: Vie privée des enfants : les résultats de l’audit du Global Privacy Enforcement Network
articles.summary: Lors de leur audit de novembre 2025, 27&nbsp;autorités internationales de protection des données ont examiné les pratiques de sites web et d’applications mobiles en matière de protection de la vie privée des enfants.
